Yeah

Just hold me in your arms

Far from these alarms

On the things we did instead

It’s only getting stranger
We can’t keep breaking 
Everything shaking 
Apart in our hands right now

snippet.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day | FINAL TRAILER CONCEPT | Marvel Studios
snippet.description:
#SpiderMan #SpiderManBrandNewDay #Marvel

► Spider-Man: Brand New Day | FINAL TRAILER CONCEPT | Marvel Studios

A Brand New Day begins. An Uprising is coming.

Here’s our Final Trailer concept for SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY, the next theatrical chapter for Peter Parker and Spider-Man. More information about the video down below!

Story and inspiration in the video:

Spider-Man: Brand New Day follows Peter Parker as he continues his life alone in a New York City that no longer knows his name. With the world forgetting Peter’s identity, he has fully committed himself to being Spider-Man, protecting the city while carrying the weight of everything he lost.

As strange events begin spreading throughout the city, Peter finds himself caught in a growing conflict that challenges everything he believes he understands about reality.

As the pressure on Spider-Man continues to grow, Peter faces a new chapter that pushes him physically and emotionally, leading to a battle that could change both him and New York forever.

Featuring “My Tears Are Becoming A Sea” by M83.

Directed by Destin Daniel Cretton and starring Tom Holland, Zendaya, and Sadie Sink, Spider-Man: Brand New Day swings into theaters July 31, 2026.

Disclaimer:

This video includes original commentary, narrative design, and editing analysis created by MovieTrailers Entertainment. All footage is used exclusively to support a transformative creative process, demonstrating trailer construction, storytelling techniques, and cinematic pacing. It combines narrative reinterpretation, original editing, and sound design within a cinematic Final Trailer format.

snippet.title: Battlestar Galactica Reboot (2026) | Matt Damon, Tom Cruise, Angelina Jolie | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#battlestargalactica #mattdamon #concepttrailer 

Watch This Battlestar Galactica Reboot Concept Trailer

What if the greatest sci-fi series ever made was reimagined for the big screen with a cast built to carry the weight of humanity's last fifty thousand survivors fleeing extinction across the stars? This fan-made concept trailer imagines a 2026 Battlestar Galactica reboot where Arnold Schwarzenegger plays Commander William Adama, a battle-scarred veteran of the first Cylon War commanding the aging warship Galactica on the day it was supposed to be decommissioned, the same day a devastating nuclear assault wipes out twelve prosperous worlds in a matter of hours. I personally created every storyboard and visual in this "What If" concept from scratch, building a cinematic retelling where Angelina Jolie plays Laura Roslin, a low-ranking government official sworn in as President aboard an evacuation transport who becomes the reluctant political leader holding the remnants of civilization together through faith, cunning, and a refusal to let humanity die quietly. Tom Cruise plays Lee "Apollo" Adama, Adama's estranged son strapping into the cockpit of a Colonial Viper to defend the fleet while carrying the crushing weight of his father's shadow into every dogfight.

Elle Fanning plays Kara "Starbuck" Thrace, the fearless and reckless best pilot on the ship who leads every sortie from the front and becomes the tip of the spear against an enemy that never stops hunting them across the void. Every visual in this HD concept trailer was designed and built by me to honor the tension, humanity, and political drama that made Battlestar Galactica a landmark in science fiction while reimagining the story with a scale and intensity worthy of the cinema screen. Matt Damon plays Dr. Gaius Baltar, a brilliant scientist whose work was secretly exploited to bring down Colonial defenses, now haunted by visions of Amanda Seyfried as Number Six, a Cylon infiltrator in a flawless human body who appears only to him, whispering and guiding the fleet toward a fate only she can see. This Battlestar Galactica reboot concept trailer launches a ragtag fleet into the unknown, chased by extinction and held together by an ancient prophecy pointing to a lost thirteenth colony called Earth, led by a commander who made a promise he cannot yet prove he can keep.

Disclaimer: This is entirely a fan-made concept trailer created for entertainment and creative purposes only. All storyboard work and visuals were originally created by me. This video is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Universal Pictures, NBCUniversal, or any official Battlestar Galactica production or its rights holders.

Along with fan-made trailers, I also share movie reviews, news, and updates from the world of entertainment. Be sure to hit that subscribe button and stay updated on all the latest from my channel!

snippet.title: Bisimanuel ft EmmaOMG - ODAJU (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Odaju is a heartfelt declaration of confidence in God's unfailing faithfulness, featuring the incredible EmmaOMG.

Inspired by the words of Jesus in Matthew 6:25–34, this song reminds us of a timeless truth: if God faithfully feeds the birds of the air and clothes the flowers of the field with beauty, how much more will He take care of His children.

In a world filled with uncertainty, Odaju is a call to rest, trust, and believe that God never abandons those who belong to Him. His provision is sure, His promises stand, and His love never fails.

May this song strengthen your faith, calm your fears, and remind you that your Father knows exactly what you need.

"Look at the birds of the air... Are you not much more valuable than they?" — Matthew 6:26

snippet.title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 | Official Teaser 2
snippet.description:
Look alive, choom — Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is coming your way this Fall!

Gear up for a return to the world of Cyberpunk, where only the ruthless survive and one wrong move can get you flatlined. This standalone story throws a fresh cast of characters into the darkest corners of Night City and brings a raw, gritty take on the world of the future. Lawless and unforgiving, this is Night City at its most brutal. 

Brought to you by CD PROJEKT RED and TRIGGER, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is directed by Kai Ikarashi (Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, SSSS.Gridman), with Kanno Ichigo (Promare, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners) as the lead designer and Hugo Award winner Bartosz Sztybor as showrunner, story writer, and producer.

TRAILER MUSIC
Original Score by Tsuneo Imahori
“You Can't Run From Me” — written by Maria Kelly and Drew Polovick, performed by Rico Nasty, produced by Drew Polovick, mixed and mastered by Elliot Polokoff

Coming to Netflix, Fall 2026. 

Stay connected:
cyberpunk.net/edgerunners2
x.com/edgerunners
facebook.com/edgerunners
instagram.com/Edgerunners

Want to experience Night City on a deeper level? Play Cyberpunk 2077 and carve your own path through the dark future.

snippet.title: Not Alone - Official Teaser Trailer (2026) Timothée Chalamet, Selena Gomez
snippet.description:
Take a look at the Teaser Trailer for Not Alone, an upcoming animated comedic film distributed by Illumination and Universal Pictures. Discover what's out there in Not Alone, in theaters April 2027.

Not Alone is centered around Joe, an introverted rocket mechanic who lives a quiet life alone alongside Fran, a brilliant astro-botanist who is developing the world’s first-ever plant-fueled rocket. When Joe and Fran are brought together to prepare for the inaugural launch of this revolutionary rocket, there are immediate sparks, but neither is particularly adept at romance. Life becomes more complicated when three aliens—tiny, unruly and adorable—take refuge in Joe’s home. Dunk, Welly, and Shirm are on the interplanetary run from a zealous-yet-inept officer of the law named Zandro. The aliens determine that Fran’s rocket could provide their means of getting back home to safety.

Not Alone stars Timothée Chalamet, Selena Gomez, Brett Goldstein, Rob Brydon, Jamie Demetriou, Diane Morgan, Allison Janney, Lamorne Morris, and more. The film is directed by Eric Guillon, Claire Dodgson, and Jonathan Del Val, with Chris Meledandri producing the film.

Not Alone is in theaters in April 2027.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.
